Offline PDF Directory to Text / Markdown Converter

This single HTML file embeds PDF.js and JSZip. It runs locally in the browser after opening; no CDN or internet connection is required.

Secure/offline build: PDF.js and JSZip are embedded in this file. Selectable-text PDFs should extract correctly. Scanned/image-only PDFs still require OCR.

Select a folder or PDFs

Use Select PDF Folder to process a directory recursively, or drag/drop PDF files here.
